---
title: "`flux2pdf`"
code-block-bg: true
---


 Save a list of plots to a pdf file, and combine plots sharing a UniqueID
 onto the same page.


## Description

Save plots to pdf

## Usage

```r


flux2pdf(plot.list, outfile = NULL, width = 11.6, height = 8.2)

```

## Arguments

**`list("plot.list")`**

: list("a list of plots; output from the function\n", list(list("flux.plot")), ".")

**`list("outfile")`**

: list("a character string indicating the full name of the pdf\n", "output file (including the path). Default is to save the pdf\n", "in the working directory, with the name of the plot.list.")

**`list("width")`**

: list("numerical value; width of the pdf page. Default is 11.6 inches.")

**`list("height")`**

: list("numerical value; height of the pdf page. Default is 8.2 inches.")

## Value


 A pdf file containing all plots from plot.list, sorted by UniqueID.


## Examples

```r


data(manID.UGGA)

CO2_flux <- goFlux(manID.UGGA, "CO2dry_ppm")

criteria <- c("MAE", "g.factor", "MDF", "SErel")

CO2_best <- best.flux(CO2_flux, criteria)

CO2_plots <- flux.plot(

  flux.results = CO2_best, dataframe = manID.UGGA,

  gastype = "CO2dry_ppm", quality.check = FALSE,

  plot.legend = c("MAE", "RMSE", "k.ratio", "g.factor", "SErel"),

  plot.display = c("Ci", "C0", "MDF", "prec", "nb.obs", "flux.term"))



list("\n", "flux2pdf(CO2_plots)")




```

## See Also


 See also the function  list(list("goFlux")) ,
           list(list("best.flux"))  and
           list(list("flux.plot")) 
          for more information about usage.
